Name: Doxygen presence check
Description: Every function must have a doxygen comment with brief and version tags
Acceptance Criteria: Undocumented functions produce presence violations; documented functions pass clean

Name: Version staleness detection
Description: Detect when function body changes but version tag is not updated
Acceptance Criteria: Modified function body without version tag change produces staleness violation

Name: Tag syntax validation
Description: Validate doxygen tag values against configured patterns and prefixes
Acceptance Criteria: Tag values not matching configured pattern or prefix produce tag violations

Name: Req coverage enforcement
Description: Functions must have requirement or exemption tags when requirements are configured
Acceptance Criteria: Functions without req or utility/internal/callback tags produce coverage violations

Name: Sequence diagram generation
Description: Generate PlantUML sequence diagrams from emits/handles/ext/triggers tags
Acceptance Criteria: Each requirement with trace-tagged functions produces a valid .puml and .png file

Name: Participant resolution from requirements
Description: Resolve diagram participants from the requirements file subsystem column
Acceptance Criteria: Functions map to participants via their req tags and the configured participant_field

Name: External participant prefix routing
Description: Route unhandled events to external participants by event prefix
Acceptance Criteria: Events matching receives_prefix of an external participant produce edges to that participant

Name: Changed function detection from git diff
Description: Cross-reference git diff line numbers with parsed functions to find changed functions
Acceptance Criteria: Functions whose body lines overlap with git diff changed lines are reported as changed

Name: Requirements file loading
Description: Load requirements from CSV/JSON/YAML with configurable ID and name columns
Acceptance Criteria: Requirements loaded and accessible by ID for impact report and participant resolution

Name: Impact report generation
Description: Group changed functions by requirement and render as markdown/JSON/text
Acceptance Criteria: Impact report lists affected requirements with their changed functions

Name: YAML config loading and merging
Description: Load .doxygen-guard.yaml and deep-merge with built-in defaults
Acceptance Criteria: User config overrides defaults; missing keys retain defaults; invalid keys rejected

Name: Per-language parse settings
Description: Resolve comment style and body detection per language from config
Acceptance Criteria: Each language gets correct comment start/end patterns and body style (braces vs indent)

Name: Function detection
Description: Detect function definitions using language-specific regex patterns
Acceptance Criteria: Functions matched by pattern with correct name capture; excludes filtered; forward declarations skipped

Name: Doxygen block extraction
Description: Find and parse doxygen comment blocks immediately before function definitions
Acceptance Criteria: Doxygen blocks associated with correct functions; all tags parsed including multi-tag single lines

Name: Python indent-based body detection
Description: Detect Python function body extent by tracking indentation levels
Acceptance Criteria: Body end correctly identified for simple functions and multi-line signatures and nested blocks

Name: Git diff parsing
Description: Parse unified diff output to extract changed line numbers
Acceptance Criteria: Hunk headers parsed to 0-indexed line sets; pure deletions excluded; git add supported
